name: rustarr-mcp
description: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Gemini CLI.'
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40060 for local use; set to https://rustarr.yourdomain.com for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: rustarr_services
settings.description: Comma-separated Rustarr services to configure. Maps to RUSTARR_SERVICES.

settings.name: sonarr_url
settings.description: Sonarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_URL.

settings.name: sonarr_api_key
settings.description: Sonarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: radarr_url
settings.description: Radarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_URL.

settings.name: radarr_api_key
settings.description: Radarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_API_KEY.
